newsArray.title: IPL 2026: RCB to start with humility, not ego of success, says Bobat
newsArray.description: RCB's director of cricket Mo Bobat says the team won't carry the 'ego of one year of success' into IPL 2026. Following their maiden 2025 title, the focus is on a fresh start, humility, and playing their brand of cricket for the fans.
creator: asianet news central

newsArray.title: Who is Mangesh Yadav? RCB's Rs 5.2 crore left-arm pacer ready to replace Yash Dayal in IPL 2026; check his journey, records & more
newsArray.description: Ahead of the IPL 2026 season, the 23-year-old Mangesh Yadav is being tipped as the ideal replacement for left-arm seamer Yash Dayal in the RCB playing XI, bringing fresh pace, swing, and all-round utility to the defending champions' attack.

newsArray.title: RCB's valuation increases by a staggering 1495 percent in 18 years
newsArray.description: Vijay Mallya's initial purchase of Royal Challengers Bengaluru for $111.6 million was driven by brand promotion, not cricket passion. Now, after an 18-year journey under Diageo's ownership and a name change to Royal Challengers Bengaluru, the franchise has been sold for a staggering $1.78 billion, marking a colossal 1495% value increase.
creator: toi sports desk

newsArray.title: RCB Sale: Aditya Birla Group-Led Consortium Purchase Royal Challengers Bengaluru in Record Breaking Deal
newsArray.description: आदित्य बिरला ग्रुप, द टाइम्स ऑफ इंडिया ग्रुप, बोल्ट वेंचर्स और ब्लैकस्टोन ने रॉयल चैलेंजर्स बेंगलुरु फ्रैंचाइजी को खरीदने का एक पक्का अनुबंध साइन कर लिया है. इसमें पुरुष और महिला दोनों टीमें शामिल हैं. इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग और वुमेंस प्रीमियर लीग फ्रैंचाइजी को यूनाइटेज स्प्रिरिट लिमिटेड (यूएसएल), जो डियाजिओ (Diageo) plc की सब्सि़डिरी कंपनी... The post RCB Sale: Aditya Birla Group-Led Consortium Purchase Royal Challengers Bengaluru in Record Breaking Deal appeared first on Cricket Country .
